rows.source_ref: paulforex, "Introducing Mr EMA50 System", ForexFactory thread 317054 (12 posts), https://www.forexfactory.com/thread/317054
rows.concept: Enter in the direction of an EMA50 breakout when the second candle opens on the far side of the EMA50, only if the first crossing candle traveled just 10-20 pips (fresh, not extended).
rows.eligibility_reason: Deterministic EMA50 open-cross entry on FX majors H1 with fixed 20-pip SL + 5-10 pip trailing stop, no TP; pure MQL5, no ML, .DWX FX data available, has stops (FTMO/DXZ-compatible).
rows.notes: Anonymous promotional forum post (paulforex, 'the Aggressive Trader', 'Wishing you 1000pips'). Core rule: BUY when 2nd candle opens above EMA50 (author confirms 1st candle must both open AND close above); valid only if 1st candle moved 10-20 pips, invalid past 40-100 pips. Mirror for SELL. Many edge cases (move <10 or 30-35 pips, opening gaps, sloping vs flat EMA, 3rd/4th-candle validity, TS-vs-SL interaction) raised by other posters and left unanswered -> PARTIAL. Just another FX trend/momentum crossover, not an uncorrelated driver; tight 20-pip SL on H1 likely whipsaws. Cited older variant: 'Nina / the 50 MA cross' (fairwind, ~6yr prior).
